visible_observations: A massive mature bearded humanoid leans forward beneath a broken stone arch, with cracked brown stone on one side and pale torn or hollowed tissue on the other.
One oversized hand is extended palm-up toward the viewer while the other hangs low; the figure wears only dark tattered cloth and fills most of the vertical frame.
The arch, asymmetrical body damage, huge feet, and split material treatment create an immediately specific full-body shape.
defects: The open palm and lowered head can read as pleading or requesting help rather than initiating an attack.
The brown stone body, cloth, arch, and dark background occupy close values, so their boundaries compress outside the pale damaged side.
The very long hanging arm, enlarged hands, and oversized feet make anatomical intent difficult to separate from image distortion.
uncertainties: The image alone does not establish whether the arch is attached anatomy, carried structure, or a background element.
Without another view or action context, the combat function of the extended hand and arch remains unclear.

visible_observations: Three black candidates are shown on a light parchment field: a tall hunched biped under a broken arch, a low four-legged cage-backed body, and a broad domed architectural body on two feet.
The three candidates differ materially in height, locomotion, negative space, and the relationship between body and structure.
defects: In the tall candidate, the arch supports and hanging arm shapes crowd the torso and make the limb count ambiguous.
The low and domed candidates read more immediately as mobile architecture or constructs than as variations of the selected humanoid body.
The selected-looking tall candidate has a comparatively ordinary bipedal lower-half contour beneath the dominant arch.
uncertainties: The A, B, and C labels do not explicitly identify which silhouette was selected.
Solid black presentation prevents inspection of whether interior anatomy resolves the apparent limb and structure ambiguity.

visible_observations: The head angles downward while the eyes look outward from beneath compressed brows; the mouth is closed and downturned inside a heavy beard.
Wet-looking hair obscures parts of the forehead and cheeks, with cracked stone on one shoulder and pale hollowed material on the other framing the face.
defects: The compressed brows, fixed stare, and closed downturned mouth support several generic readings, including anger, fatigue, grief, or sternness, without a clearly visible contradiction.
The nearly frontal, largely symmetrical facial arrangement supplies little asymmetry or target-specific interaction beyond looking toward the camera.
Hair shadow and the dark palette reduce the readability of eyelid, cheek, and mouth detail.
uncertainties: An unaided viewing cannot determine what the figure wants from the viewer or what it is refusing to reveal.
The face crop does not show enough of the extended hand to determine whether face and gesture express the same intent.

visible_observations: At native size, a broken overhead ring, broad shoulders, two large feet, and a pale damaged side remain visible around a centered humanoid mass.
The dark figure occupies a narrow central portion of the square against a near-black background.
defects: The face, open hand, material cracking, hollow shoulder, and cloth detail collapse into a small dark cluster.
Similar dark values merge the arch, hair, torso, arm, and background, weakening the separation of the defining body parts.
The surviving read is dominated by the arch-and-bulk outline rather than the figure's facial or gestural identity.
uncertainties: No neighboring unit icons, gameplay background, selection frame, or motion state are shown, so in-context recognition cannot be determined from this image alone.
